page_content:
PHYS428 Physics Capstone Research (2-4 Credits)

Individual, focused research under the guidance of a faculty member. Discussion, presentations and, if appropriate, research group projects involved. Student must submit final research paper for completion of course. Paper may also serve as thesis required for High Honors in Physics. Not intended as a general "reading course” (see PHYS499). Restriction: Must be in a major within CMNS-Physics department; and senior standing or higher; and permission of instructor.
